title: Degiskenler ve Tipler
subtitle: Temel veri tipleri ve tip donusumu.
code:
age = 25
price = 19.99
name = "Ahmet"
is_active = True

print("Isim:", name)
print("Yas:", age)
print("Fiyat:", price)
print("Aktif mi:", is_active)

# Tip kontrolu
print("\nTip kontrolleri:")
print(type(age))
print(type(price))
print(type(name))
print(type(is_active))

# Tip donusumu
age_text = str(age)
parsed_age = int("30")
parsed_price = float("9.5")

print("\nDonusturulen degerler:")
print("Yas metni:", age_text, "- tip:", type(age_text))
print("Parsed yas:", parsed_age)
print("Parsed fiyat:", parsed_price)

# Coklu atama
x, y, z = 1, 2, 3
print("\nCoklu atama:", x, y, z)
